title: Waivor's Melee & Tools Pack
description: A simple weapons and tools texture pack that aims to revamp the old textures.
body:
Waivor’s Melee Tools Pack reimagines Minecraft’s classic weapons and tools with a fresh, detailed look while preserving the game’s original charm. This pack focuses on enhancing the visual style of melee weapons, tools, and a few iconic blocks to make your world feel sharper, cleaner, and more immersive.

**Features**

Redesigned textures for all melee weapons and tools (swords, axes, pickaxes, etc.)

Custom retextures for select blocks, including the enchantment table, end portal frame, and ender chest

Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1+

Works seamlessly with shaders and other vanilla-style packs

No gameplay or mechanic changes — purely visual

**Purpose**

This pack is perfect for players who want refined visuals without straying too far from vanilla Minecraft’s style. Every design was made to feel familiar yet noticeably upgraded — ideal for survival worlds, builds, or PVP.
